overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of Spider-Man in a white/silver suit with glowing blue spider emblem walking through a wet city street at night. The character moves from a busy avenue with vehicle traffic and pedestrians into progressively narrower and darker urban streets, eventually approaching an Oscorp facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: city avenue with vehicle traffic and sidewalk pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet city street between tall buildings

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving past on the right side of the street

entered.detail: tall modern glass and concrete office buildings lining the left side of the street with illuminated windows
tall modern buildings with reflective glass facades on the right side
row of green public trash bins lined up on the sidewalk
red newspaper vending machines on the sidewalk near the trash bins
tall black street lamps casting light on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a wet city avenue at night, flanked by tall office buildings with illuminated windows. Green trash bins and red newspaper boxes line the left sidewalk while vehicles pass by on the right. The street lamps reflect off the damp asphalt as pedestrians walk along the sidewalks.

events.description: character steps onto and crosses the white striped pedestrian crosswalk
yellow taxi cab drives past on the right side of the character

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection via the crosswalk and continuing down the avenue

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving past the character on the right

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing stripes on the asphalt
classic yellow taxi cab with illuminated roof sign

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide intersection via the crosswalk, surrounded by other pedestrians. A yellow taxi passes by on the right as the character continues down the avenue. The street remains wet and reflective under the city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: side street with bank building and ATMs

events.description: character turns left at the intersection onto a narrower side street

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and proceeding down a narrower street

entered.detail: corner building with stone facade and arched windows housing a bank
illuminated ATM machines recessed into the bank building wall

segments.scene_description: Turning left at the intersection, the character enters a narrower side street. A bank building with illuminated ATMs occupies the corner on the left. The street is less busy with fewer pedestrians and no vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark alley leading to corporate building

events.description: entering darker narrow alley with significantly reduced ambient lighting
approaching the illuminated Oscorp building sign at the end of the alley

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow dark alley toward the Oscorp building

entered.detail: illuminated corporate Oscorp sign glowing at the end of the dark alley
tall dark building walls creating a narrow enclosed canyon effect

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a narrow, dark alley with tall building walls on both sides creating an enclosed corridor. The lighting becomes significantly dimmer with only street lamps illuminating the wet ground. Ahead, the glowing Oscorp sign becomes visible at the end of the alley as the character approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Spider-Man transitions from a bustling, brightly lit city avenue into the oppressive shadows of a narrow urban alley. It begins with the character walking along a wet avenue flanked by illuminated office buildings, where street lamps reflect off damp asphalt and pedestrians mingle near red newspaper boxes. As the character crosses a wide intersection amidst passing yellow taxis, the scene shifts when he turns left, moving away from the traffic and into a quieter side street marked by a bank with glowing ATMs. The environment then tightens into a dark, enclosed corridor of towering walls where the lighting dims significantly, leaving only sparse lamps to light the wet ground. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into the gloom until the glowing Oscorp sign emerges at the far end of the alley.
